Contact

Reach SLYDE for support, partnerships, and onboarding questions

Use this route for general support, Slyder help, business partnership discussions, and API or integration conversations.

Send a MessageBusiness Inquiry

Contact paths

Slyder help

Application status, onboarding questions, activation guidance, and readiness follow-up.

Business route

Merchant and enterprise partnership discussions, service coverage requests, and delivery operations planning.

Partner/API route

API access, delivery orchestration discussions, and integration workflow planning.

Support Contact

Send a message

Use this form for support or general contact. Business and API teams can also route here if they need a direct response.

Secure public intake flow
Ready for backend routing

These forms are wired to the public intake architecture and can be redirected to production services later without changing the page flow.

Jamaica-First Logistics Infrastructure

SLYDE connects courier capacity, merchant fulfillment, and partner-ready logistics workflows.

Built for local operational credibility now, with standards that can support wider Caribbean scale later.
SLYDELogistics

SLYDE is a modern logistics network for Jamaica first, designed to support courier operations, merchant fulfillment, and future Caribbean partner integrations.

SLYDE is a company of A'Dash Technologies, the parent company and sister brand of GrabQuik.

Developed by Ashandie Powell.

Located in Southfield, St. Elizabeth, Jamaica.
